description: Potion-rule retrofit, hercule.md + aether-foundation.md precedent pattern. The 'franchise's clearest case' phrasing claimed Bandai/Dimps articulated the BBL apparatus-of-extraction thesis. They did not. They authored the scientist-builds-weapon / weapon-consumes-scientist character-design across the 2015 + 2016 Xenoverse games; BBL reads the apparatus-of-extraction-via-bio-engineered-weapon-manufacture overlay on top of their canonical-event. The retrofit names this distinction explicitly: canonical-event = Bandai Namco / Dimps' villain-cohort character-design; curatorial-overlay = BBL's apparatus-of-extraction reading. Single-cluster-per-wave pacing respected per wave-79 sidecar recommendation (xenoverse-villains.md line 69 was named as the cleanest single-sentence remaining retrofit target). Piccolo-jr.md (3 instances at lines 24 + 42 + 50) remains the largest retrofit surface and is deferred to a dedicated future wave per the wave-79 recommendation.
